items.title: Home Depot (HD) Stock Is Coming Back, Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 12 Stocks on Jim Cramer’s Radar. The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar. Home improvement retailer The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD)’s shares are down by 5.5% over the past year and are up by 11.3% year-to-date. UBS discussed the firm in late February. The bank […]

items.title: The job market was bruising in 2025. The start of 2026 doesn't look much better.
items.description: A slew of data releases this past week suggested that at the start of 2026, the job market remained stuck at best — and flashed further signs of splintering at worst.

items.title: U.S. Economy: 3 Positive Trends And 3 Disconcerting Ones
